name: python3-django-appconf
title: python3-django-appconf
summary: helper class handling configuration defaults of apps - Python 3.x
description:
helper class handling configuration defaults of apps - Python 3.x
Say you have an app with a few defaults, which you want to refer to in the
app's code without repeating yourself all the time. Django-appconf provides
a simple helper class to implement those defaults.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-appconf because helper class handling configuration defaults of apps - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-appconf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-appconf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-appconf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
